name: Eggplant Paremesan
recipeIngredient: 2 large eggplants, peeled and sliced into 1/4 inch rounds
recipeInstructions:
1. Dip each eggplant slice into the beaten egg, then dredge in flour.
2. Heat vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Fry battered slices until golden brown on both sides, about 3-4 minutes per side.
3. Layer eggplant slices, parmesan and mozzarella cheese, and marinara sauce in a casserole dish.
4. Sprinkle remaining grated parmesan on top, then bake at 350°F for 20-25 minutes until the top is lightly browned and bubbly. Allow to cool slightly before serving.
Marinara Sauce:
1. Sauté minced garlic and chopped onion in olive oil over medium heat until translucent.
2. Add crushed tomatoes, red wine, bay leaf, salt, pepper, basil, oregano, and red pepper flakes (if using). Simmer for 10 minutes.
3. Adjust seasoning to taste. If the sauce becomes too thick, add water or more tomato sauce as needed.
